title: USGS Water Data for the Nation
description: A USGS source card for streamflow, groundwater, water quality, and real-time water data.
license: Public Domain / some linked media may vary

pages.text: USGS Water Data for the Nation shares streamflow, lake levels, groundwater, precipitation, and water-quality observations from monitoring stations.
Use this source for graph reading, local watershed investigations, evidence-based claims, and discussions about floods, drought, and water resources.
USGS water data are generally public domain, but linked maps, photos, or partner resources may include separate notices or attribution requests.
